calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Amanda K. Pawlyk, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, IDSC Holdings LLC, a Wisconsin limited liability Company.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Autoworld Collision, a California limited liability company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness: Michael Kelley Killgore sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $25,349.22
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $590.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $25,939.22
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
